title: pternandra tessellata
intro: Pternandra tessellata, also known as the "Native Hibiscus" or "Green Mahonia", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rapaneaceae, native to Australia. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pternandra tessellata include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
